title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
abstract: Voyager is the first LLM-powered embodied lifelong learning agent that drives exploration, masters a wide range of skills, and makes new discoveries continually without human intervention in Minecraft.

environment.name: Minecraft
features: No predefined end goal or fixed storyline

methodology.training: No parameter access or gradient-based training

key_components.name: Automatic curriculum
key_components.purpose: Maximizes exploration and proposes suitable tasks

key_components.name: Iterative prompting mechanism
key_components.purpose: Generates executable code for embodied control

capabilities: Task proposal based on skill level and world state
Skill refinement based on environmental feedback
Discovery of new items and skills

results.discovery: Continually discovers new Minecraft items and skills
